name: Findorr Carius
description:
Findorr is a minor antagonist from the series Bleach. He is the 24th Arrancar within Aizen's Arrancar army and also serving as a fraccion for the 2nd Espada, Barragan.

Findorr is a slim male Arrancar. The remnants of his Hollow mask consist of a smooth helmet covering the upper half of his face with yellow eye holes and a row of teeth sewn across his chin like a strap. His Hollow hole is not visible. Findorr's Arrancar outfit vaguely resembles a Spanish soldier. He has customized it with shoulder pads, knee-high boots, and a knife-like protrusion on both of his sleeves which extend along the top of his hands. He wears his hakama with the legs tucked into his boots. He has long, flowing blond hair and leopard-like, light purple markings around his gray eyes.

While possessing the usual abilities of an Arrancar like Sonido and Cero; his Cero being indigo in color, he also has an ability "Afinar" which makes his hollow mask act as an inhibitor and when fragments are broken off will raise his power exponentially until he is nearly Soul Reaper captain level. His zanpakutou "Pinza Aguda" when released changes his form to give plated armor resembling a crab on mostly his right side, a larger pincer taking up his right arm and the smaller one on the left. In it he can manipulate water for attacking.
creator: AnimeMan1993
